_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: CN Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. New Stage B labels remain pending project-owner approval for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: CN Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed CN/AE Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: no mnpi will be shared prior to posting on sse website (sse.example)
hr rosters in any data room to be pseudonymized, with no resident id collected
any export of operational data to investor affiliates outside mainland china will undergo cac record-filing or security assessment if triggered
mac/mae: the parties agree that general epidemics, industry-wide policy changes, or routine csl/dsl inspections shall not constitute a material adverse change for closing purposes.
timeline and disclosure: target signing is post-csrc guidance; according to the issuer’s 2023 annual report and 2024 q1 update (public), capex and major customer data are already disclosed.
